storyboard.content: I am having severe trouble breathing and feel like I'm suffocating right now
This started suddenly about 20 minutes ago after I went outside in the cold air
I have severe tightness in my chest and I am wheezing loudly
My lips feel tingly and I feel like I might pass out
I've used my inhaler several times but it is not helping at all
This is the worst breathing has ever felt. I am in severe distress and can barely speak
I'm a 25-year-old woman with severe asthma
